CustomField.description: Due Date of the Rent Invoices calculated as Fixed or Relative. If Fixed is selected, user must enter a value in the field Rent Due Day (Fixed).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fixed Date: If selected, you must enter a value in the "Rent Due Day (Fixed)" field. Fixed Day in a Week: If selected, provide values for both the "Day" and "Weekday Number" fields. Relative: If selected, enter the number of days in the "Rent Due Day" field. This will push the rent due date by the specified number of days from the Invoice Date/rent start date.
CustomField.label: Rent Due Type

value.fullName: Relative Based On Rent Period Start Date
value.label: Relative Based On Rent Period Start Date
